---
title: "Evaluating Personal Job Market Prospects in 2024"
subtitle: "Final Report"
author:
  - name: Essha Khan
    affiliations:
      - id: bu
        name: Boston University
        city: Boston
        state: MA
  - name: Shuyu Bai
    affiliations:
      - id: bu
        name: Boston University
        city: Boston
        state: MA
date: today
date-modified: today
date-format: long
format: 
    docx: default
---
{{< include index.qmd >}}
{{< include data_analysis.qmd >}}
{{< include Visualizations.qmd >}}
{{< include career_plan.qmd >}}
